title: An Ordinance Authorizing the Temporary Closure of the Entire Stretch of Luna Street and Villegas Street in Barangay Baybayin, J.p. Rizal Street in Barangay Timugan and Lopez Avenue in Barangay Batong Malake, Los Baños, Laguna for the Conduct of Events in Celebration of the 22nd Bañamos Festival in Conjunction with the 408th Foundation Anniversary of Los Baños.
